problem.title: Check If Strings Can Be Made Equal With Operations Ii

approaches.title: Parity-partitioned character frequency counting
approaches.summary: Checks that the multisets of characters at even positions and odd positions match between the two strings. Implementations evolve from HashMaps to fixed-size 26

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial solution using separate HashMaps for even- and odd-index character frequencies.

revisions.rawCommitSubject: java 2840: pre-sized array intead of hashmap
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaces HashMaps with fixed-size arrays and combines the even/odd counting into one pass.

revisions.rawCommitSubject: java 2840: i forgot what i changed
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Uses one reusable difference array, checking and resetting parity counts between the even and odd passes.

approaches.title: Aggregate checksum comparison
approaches.summary: Attempts to compare even- and odd-position character groups using XOR and sums of squared character codes instead of explicit frequency counts.

revisions.commitComment: crazy xor n square diff trick
revisions.rawCommitSubject: java 2840: crazy xor n square diff trick
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaces frequency arrays with XOR and squared-value aggregate checks for each parity.
